perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white lace top and a straw hat stands in a brick-paved courtyard, smiling at the camera. (2) The scene shifts to focus on several large, ornate bronze bells hanging on a wooden frame; a hand enters the frame and strikes a bell with a mallet. (3) The woman holds a smartphone showing a musical tuner app, listening intently to the bell's resonance and nodding. (4) She correctly identifies the notes of multiple bells in sequence, reacting with increasing excitement, jumping, and raising her fist in celebration while another woman watches from the side.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in an upbeat, conversational tone in Mandarin Chinese against a background of outdoor ambient noise. (2) Each time a bell is struck, a deep, resonant, and lingering metallic percussion sound dominates the audio. (3) The woman is heard humming or singing the notes ("La~ La~") to match the bells, followed by her calling out the note names like "A" or "G". (4) High-pitched electronic dinging sound effects are heard whenever she gets a note right, accompanied by her cheering and laughing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "當你有一個絕對音感的朋友" (When you have a friend with perfect pitch) - Hook text. (2) "降Si吧？ (P#Si = Bb)" - Functional text explaining the musical note. (3) "正確x1", "正確x2", "正確x3" - Sequential decorative text counting her correct guesses. (4) "不可能降Si&降La都聽得出來欸！" (Impossible that you can distinguish B-flat and A-flat!) - Emotional decorative text. (5) "你可不可以不要什麼都會啊！" (Can you please not be good at everything!) - Playful closing hook.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female friend standing nearby, 1 person (hand only) striking the bell, and 1 monk walking in the distant background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with a long brown braid, wearing a wide-brimmed woven sun hat, a white crochet-style lace cardigan over a white dress, and a black choker.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A traditional Thai temple courtyard with red brick flooring, large ornamental bronze bells, white benches, and temple-style buildings with red roofs in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence of Talent -> Culmination -> Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and verify the main character's rare talent of 'perfect pitch' by having her identify the specific musical notes of traditional temple bells without a reference tone. The video aims to entertain and impress the audience with this specific skill.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of a digital tuner app on a smartphone serves as an objective 'referee' to validate the influencer's claims, increasing the video's credibility and engagement.
